array_types.name: Pseudo_Map_Vector
array_types.code: type Pseudo_Map_Vector is array (Positive range <>) of Pseudo_Character_Map;

record_types.name: Pseudo_Character_Map

subprograms.name: Add_Mapping
subprograms.code:
procedure Add_Mapping (Pseudo_Map : in out Pseudo_Map_Type;
                       Mapping    : Pseudo_Map_Vector)

documentation.description: Add vector of character mappings to the pseudo map.
Characters used to mark the start and end of a formatted argument.
Characters used to mark the start and end of a formatted argument.

subprograms.name: Map
subprograms.code:
function Map (Pseudo_Map : Pseudo_Map_Type;
              Ch         : Wide_Character) return Wide_Character

documentation.description: Return the mapping for a character wrt a pseudo map.
Characters used to mark the start and end of a formatted message.
Characters used to mark the start and end of a formatted message.
